goal: Replace the tiny smoke model with the first structured encoder variant on local Blackwell-compatible hardware.
stop_conditions: CUDA OOM after one bounded parameter reduction retry
compile or attention path fails before first optimizer step
next_if_pass: Record C2.0 structured encoder baseline and proceed to canonical resume validation.
next_if_fail: Reduce structured model size or disable compile only if the failure is model-specific, then rerun the same bounded gate.
